title: Reduced Nether Fog
description: Reduces nether fog, especially on the nether roof
body:
## _NOTE: This pack requires [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) to work._

This simple resource pack just reduces the nether fog, and reduces it even further while you're on the nether roof.

Here's a comparison:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0428aea5c0d95edb2a199ff561dddb35ad57608e.jpeg)
